data.requirement: Join soil_analysis_data via District column to enrich dataset with soil characteristics
data.reason: Essential for cluster analysis as soil parameters (N/P/K) are unavailable in current joins

data.requirement: Remove dependency on crop_price_data Date field for temporal analysis
data.reason: Yield/water metrics are seasonal (Kharif/Rabi) rather than daily - transaction dates don't align with agricultural cycles

visualization.requirement: Remove line chart temporal analysis visualization
visualization.reason: Transaction dates from price data don't correlate with production/water metrics and would create misleading time-series interpretations
